sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89565" key="proskaterei/pw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατ-ερείπω</orth>, <sense id="n89565.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">complete the overthrow</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruin of</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν Ἑλλάδα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:7:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7.10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
